ipad-air-m4.title: M4 Chip Performance
ipad-air-m4.desc: The M4 chip delivers an 8-core CPU, 9-core GPU, and 16-core Neural Engine. Up to 2.3x faster than iPad Air with M1.

ipad-air-m4.title: Liquid Retina Display
ipad-air-m4.desc: 11-inch and 13-inch Liquid Retina displays with P3 wide color, True Tone, and full lamination for vivid, true-to-life colors.

ipad-air-m4.title: Apple Intelligence
ipad-air-m4.desc: Image Wand, Writing Tools, Clean Up, and more — all processed with privacy in mind using on-device intelligence and Private Cloud Compute.

ipad-air-m4.title: Apple Pencil Pro
ipad-air-m4.desc: Squeeze, barrel roll, and haptic feedback. Hover to preview marks before you make them. A new way to create.

ipad-air-m4.title: Center Stage Camera
ipad-air-m4.desc: 12MP front camera with Center Stage keeps you centered in frame during video calls, even as you move around.

ipad-air-m4.title: Wi-Fi 7 & 5G Connectivity
ipad-air-m4.desc: Blazing-fast Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and optional 5G cellular with eSIM. Stay connected everywhere.

ipad-air-m4.title: Apps & Creativity
ipad-air-m4.desc: Over a million apps designed specifically for iPad. From Adobe Creative Suite to GoodNotes, Procreate, and more.

ipad-air-m4.title: Beautiful Design
ipad-air-m4.desc: Available in Space Gray, Blue, Purple, and Starlight. Just 6.1mm thin and weighing about a pound.

iphone-17-pro.title: Pro Camera System
iphone-17-pro.desc: 48MP Fusion camera with 8x optical-quality zoom range. Capture stunning photos in any light with Photonic Engine.

iphone-17-pro.title: A19 Pro Chip
iphone-17-pro.desc: The most powerful chip ever in a smartphone. Blazing-fast performance for gaming, AR, and pro workflows.

iphone-17-pro.title: Titanium Design
iphone-17-pro.desc: Grade 5 titanium with a brushed finish. The strongest material ever used in an iPhone, yet remarkably light.

iphone-17-pro.title: Super Retina XDR Display
iphone-17-pro.desc: 6.3-inch Always-On display with ProMotion 120Hz, 2000 nits peak brightness outdoors, and Dynamic Island.

iphone-17-pro.title: Action Button & Controls
iphone-17-pro.desc: Customizable Action button and Camera Control. Quick access to your favorite features with a single press.

iphone-17-pro.title: Apple Intelligence
iphone-17-pro.desc: Powerful AI capabilities with on-device processing. Writing Tools, Visual Intelligence, and more.

iphone-17-pro.title: All-Day Battery
iphone-17-pro.desc: Up to 33 hours of video playback. The longest battery life ever in an iPhone Pro. USB-C with USB 3 speeds.

iphone-17-pro.title: Privacy & Security
iphone-17-pro.desc: Face ID, Emergency SOS via satellite, Crash Detection, and industry-leading privacy protections.

macbook-neo.title: A18 Pro Chip
macbook-neo.desc: Delivers powerful everyday performance for browsing, streaming, and creative work. Energy efficient for all-day battery life.

macbook-neo.title: 13-inch Liquid Retina Display
macbook-neo.desc: 3.6 million pixels, 500 nits brightness, and support for 1 billion colors. Everything looks stunning.

macbook-neo.title: Apple Intelligence
macbook-neo.desc: Built-in AI capabilities including Writing Tools, Genmoji, and Clean Up. All with privacy-first design.

macbook-neo.title: Four Stunning Colors
macbook-neo.desc: Silver, Blush, Citrus, and Indigo. A durable recycled aluminum enclosure with 60% recycled content.

macbook-neo.title: macOS & Continuity
macbook-neo.desc: Works seamlessly with iPhone through Handoff, iPhone Mirroring, AirDrop, and Universal Clipboard.

macbook-neo.title: Security & Privacy
macbook-neo.desc: Touch ID, Find My, FileVault encryption, and built-in antivirus protection keep your data safe.

apple-watch-series-11.title: Health Monitoring
apple-watch-series-11.desc: Hypertension notifications, sleep apnea detection, ECG, blood oxygen, and temperature sensing. Your health at a glance.

apple-watch-series-11.title: Sleep Tracking
apple-watch-series-11.desc: Sleep Score tracks duration, consistency, and sleep stages. Wake up knowing how well you rested.

apple-watch-series-11.title: Fitness & Workout
apple-watch-series-11.desc: Workout Buddy delivers personalized audible motivation in real time. Precision GPS tracking for running, cycling, and more.

apple-watch-series-11.title: Always-On Display
apple-watch-series-11.desc: Wide-angle OLED Always-On Retina display with up to 2000 nits brightness. 2x more scratch resistant.

apple-watch-series-11.title: Design & Bands
apple-watch-series-11.desc: 42mm and 46mm sizes in aluminum and titanium. Rose Gold, Silver, Jet Black, Space Gray, and more.

apple-watch-series-11.title: 5G Cellular
apple-watch-series-11.desc: Stay connected without your iPhone. Make calls, send texts, and stream music with 5G cellular.

airpods-pro-3.title: Active Noise Cancellation
airpods-pro-3.desc: H3 chip powers advanced computational audio. Block outside noise for total immersion.

airpods-pro-3.title: Spatial Audio
airpods-pro-3.desc: Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking creates a theater-like experience.

airpods-pro-3.title: Hearing Health
airpods-pro-3.desc: Hearing test, hearing aid feature, and hearing protection. A complete hearing health experience.

airpods-pro-3.title: H3 Chip
airpods-pro-3.desc: Custom Apple silicon delivers smarter noise cancellation, immersive sound, and efficient battery life.

macbook-pro-14.title: M5 Chip
macbook-pro-14.desc: The M5 chip delivers groundbreaking performance with an industry-leading CPU, GPU, and Neural Engine. Edit 8K video, compile code, and run demanding pro apps with ease.

macbook-pro-14.title: M5 Pro & M5 Max
macbook-pro-14.desc: Scale up to M5 Pro for even more unified memory and GPU cores, or go all out with M5 Max for the most demanding pro workflows.

macbook-pro-14.title: Liquid Retina XDR Display
macbook-pro-14.desc: A stunning 14.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display with extreme dynamic range, 1600 nits peak HDR brightness, ProMotion 120Hz adaptive refresh, and nano-texture option.

macbook-pro-14.title: Design & Build
macbook-pro-14.desc: Crafted from recycled aluminum in Space Black and Silver. Impossibly thin yet built to last with an all-day battery.

macbook-pro-14.title: All-Day Battery
macbook-pro-14.desc: Up to 22 hours of battery life lets you work unplugged all day. MagSafe fast charging gets you back up quickly.

macbook-pro-14.title: Pro Camera & Audio
macbook-pro-14.desc: 1080p FaceTime HD camera with Center Stage, studio-quality mic array, and a six-speaker sound system with Spatial Audio.

macbook-pro-14.title: Apple Intelligence
macbook-pro-14.desc: Built-in AI that helps you write, summarize, create images, and more — all with privacy at the core.

macbook-pro-14.title: macOS & Continuity
macbook-pro-14.desc: macOS with Liquid Glass design. Use iPhone Mirroring, Handoff, Universal Clipboard, and AirDrop seamlessly across devices.

macbook-pro-14.title: Connectivity
macbook-pro-14.desc: Thunderbolt 5 ports, HDMI, SDXC slot, MagSafe, and headphone jack. Connect to multiple external displays.

macbook-pro-14.title: Pro Apps & Workflows
macbook-pro-14.desc: Run Final Cut Pro, Logic Pro, Xcode, Adobe Creative Suite, 3D rendering, and AAA games with incredible performance.

macbook-pro-14.title: Security & Privacy
macbook-pro-14.desc: Touch ID, FileVault encryption, Find My, and the Apple T2 Security Chip keep your data safe.

macbook-pro-16.title: M5 Pro & M5 Max
macbook-pro-16.desc: The most powerful MacBook Pro ever. M5 Pro with up to 18-core GPU, or M5 Max with up to 40-core GPU for extreme workloads.

macbook-pro-16.title: 16.2-inch XDR Display
macbook-pro-16.desc: The largest Liquid Retina XDR display on any MacBook. ProMotion 120Hz, 1600 nits peak HDR, P3 wide color. Available with nano-texture glass.

macbook-pro-16.title: All-Day Battery
macbook-pro-16.desc: Up to 24 hours of battery life — the longest ever in a Mac. Fast charge with MagSafe.

macbook-pro-16.title: Design
macbook-pro-16.desc: Thin, light aluminum unibody in Space Black and Silver. Built to go anywhere your work takes you.

macbook-pro-16.title: Apple Intelligence
macbook-pro-16.desc: AI-powered writing, coding, and creative tools built right into macOS. Privacy-first processing on device.

macbook-pro-16.title: Pro Apps & Workflows
macbook-pro-16.desc: Edit 8K ProRes video, compile massive codebases, render 3D scenes, and run AAA games natively.

macbook-air-13.title: M5 Chip Performance
macbook-air-13.desc: The M5 chip makes everything feel instant — from launching apps to editing photos to multitasking across dozens of tabs.

macbook-air-13.title: Fanless & Thin Design
macbook-air-13.desc: Impossibly thin, completely silent. The MacBook Air runs cool without a fan, in four gorgeous colors.

macbook-air-13.title: Apple Intelligence
macbook-air-13.desc: Smart writing tools, image generation, and Siri powered by Apple Intelligence — all processed privately.

macbook-air-13.title: macOS & Continuity
macbook-air-13.desc: macOS works beautifully with your iPhone, iPad, and other Apple devices via Handoff, AirDrop, and iPhone Mirroring.

imac-24.title: M5 Chip
imac-24.desc: The M5 chip powers everything you do on iMac — from creative workflows to everyday tasks, all with incredible efficiency.

imac-24.title: 4.5K Retina Display
imac-24.desc: A stunning 24-inch 4.5K Retina display with 500 nits brightness, P3 wide color, and True Tone.

imac-24.title: Apple Intelligence
imac-24.desc: AI-powered tools for writing, creating, and communicating — built into every app on macOS.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: Pro Camera System
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: 48MP Fusion camera, 48MP Ultra Wide, and 12MP 5x Telephoto with 8x optical-quality zoom. The most versatile pro camera system.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: A19 Pro Chip
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: The most powerful smartphone chip. A19 Pro enables console-quality gaming, advanced machine learning, and all-day battery.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: 6.9-inch Display
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: The largest Super Retina XDR display ever on an iPhone. Always-On, ProMotion 120Hz, 2000 nits outdoor peak brightness.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: Titanium Design
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: Grade 5 titanium frame — the strongest material ever in an iPhone. Remarkably light, stunningly beautiful.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: All-Day Battery
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: Up to 39 hours of video playback — the longest battery life ever in any iPhone.

iphone-17-pro-max.title: Apple Intelligence
iphone-17-pro-max.desc: Powerful AI with on-device processing. Writing Tools, Visual Intelligence, Genmoji, and Image Playground.

iphone-air.title: Incredibly Thin
iphone-air.desc: The thinnest iPhone ever at just 5.5mm. Amazingly light yet packed with pro-level technology.

iphone-air.title: A18 Chip
iphone-air.desc: The A18 chip delivers fast performance and all-day battery life with incredible power efficiency.

iphone-air.title: Camera
iphone-air.desc: 48MP main camera with Smart HDR and Photonic Engine for stunning photos in every light.

iphone-air.title: Apple Intelligence
iphone-air.desc: AI-powered features that help you write, create, and communicate — all processed with privacy in mind.

iphone-17.title: Delightful Design
iphone-17.desc: Beautiful new design with Ceramic Shield 2 — 3x better scratch resistance. Available in 5 vibrant colors.

iphone-17.title: A18 Chip
iphone-17.desc: A18 delivers serious power for gaming, photography, and multitasking with all-day battery life.

iphone-17.title: 48MP Camera
iphone-17.desc: 48MP main camera plus 12MP Ultra Wide. Smart HDR, Photonic Engine, and 4K Cinematic video.

iphone-17.title: Dynamic Island
iphone-17.desc: Dynamic Island shows alerts, Live Activities, and music controls in a fluid, interactive way.

iphone-17e.title: Feature Stacked
iphone-17e.desc: Everything you need in an iPhone — powerful chip, great camera, and Apple Intelligence — at an amazing value.

iphone-17e.title: 48MP Camera
iphone-17e.desc: 48MP main camera captures incredible detail. Smart HDR and Photonic Engine make every shot look amazing.

iphone-17e.title: Apple Intelligence
iphone-17e.desc: AI features like Writing Tools, Genmoji, and Clean Up help you do more every day.

ipad-pro-m5.title: M5 Chip
ipad-pro-m5.desc: The M5 chip with hardware-accelerated ray tracing makes iPad Pro the most powerful iPad ever.

ipad-pro-m5.title: Ultra Retina XDR Display
ipad-pro-m5.desc: Tandem OLED Ultra Retina XDR display with extreme brightness, contrast, and color accuracy.

ipad-pro-m5.title: Apple Pencil Pro
ipad-pro-m5.desc: Squeeze, barrel roll, and haptic feedback. Hover to preview. The ultimate creative tool.

ipad-pro-m5.title: Pro Workflows
ipad-pro-m5.desc: Run desktop-class apps like Final Cut Pro, Logic Pro, and Adobe Creative Suite natively.

ipad-10.title: Liquid Retina Display
ipad-10.desc: 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display with True Tone. Perfect for watching, reading, and creating.

ipad-10.title: Apps & Entertainment
ipad-10.desc: Over a million apps designed for iPad. Great for school, work, and play.

apple-watch-ultra-3.title: Titanium Build
apple-watch-ultra-3.desc: 49mm titanium case built for extreme environments. Water resistant to 100m with EN13319 certification for recreational diving.

apple-watch-ultra-3.title: Advanced Health
apple-watch-ultra-3.desc: Blood oxygen, ECG, temperature sensing, depth gauge, and water temperature. The most health sensors ever in Apple Watch.

apple-watch-ultra-3.title: 72-Hour Battery
apple-watch-ultra-3.desc: Up to 72 hours of battery life in Low Power Mode. Built for multi-day adventures.

apple-watch-ultra-3.title: Precision GPS
apple-watch-ultra-3.desc: Dual-frequency precision GPS with detailed trail maps. Action Button for quick access to features.

airpods-max-2.title: High-Fidelity Sound
airpods-max-2.desc: Custom-built drivers deliver rich, detailed sound across the entire frequency range. Computational audio adapts in real time.

airpods-max-2.title: Active Noise Cancellation
airpods-max-2.desc: Industry-leading ANC blocks outside noise so you can fully immerse in your music.

airpods-max-2.title: Premium Design
airpods-max-2.desc: Breathable knit mesh canopy, stainless steel frame, and memory foam ear cushions. Available in 5 colors with USB-C.

airpods-4.title: Open-Ear Comfort
airpods-4.desc: Redesigned for all-day comfort. The open-ear design lets you stay aware of your surroundings.

airpods-4.title: Spatial Audio
airpods-4.desc: Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking creates a theater-like listening experience.

apple-pencil-pro.title: Precision & Control
apple-pencil-pro.desc: Squeeze for tool switching, barrel roll for pen angle, and haptic feedback. Pixel-perfect precision with hover preview.

magic-keyboard-ipad.title: Keyboard & Trackpad
magic-keyboard-ipad.desc: Full-size backlit keyboard with function row and a large, responsive trackpad. USB-C passthrough for charging.

airtag.title: Precision Finding
airtag.desc: Ultra Wideband technology gives precise distance and direction to your AirTag. The Find My network with billions of devices helps locate items around the world.
